old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-35qo","title":"Increase ping_l2 Native64 idle stack","description":"Boot failure discovered by project-LICHEN-m5m1.5. net.lichen.ping_l2_full_path reaches Zephyr and L2 initialization on native_sim/native/64, then the 256-byte idle thread trips _StackCheckHandler before ztest completion. Add a test-only Native64-safe CONFIG_IDLE_STACK_SIZE; do not change production L2/RX stack sizing.","acceptance_criteria":"1. ping_l2 uses a sufficient test-only idle stack. 2. Native64 firmware boots and all ping_l2 ztests pass. 3. Production stack configuration is unchanged. 4. Three independent review passes complete.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-15T23:56:32.170971Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-15T23:56:32.170971Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-35qo","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-m5m1.5","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2026-07-15T23:56:32.290497Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
new_value: {"acceptance_criteria":"1. Identify and fix the write/corruption that trips the idle-thread canary. 2. Explain or correct the two pre-fatal authentication failures. 3. ping_l2 boots and all ztests pass on Native64 with stack protection enabled. 4. No arbitrary stack-size masking or weakened authentication/test oracle. 5. Three independent review passes complete.","description":"Runtime blocker discovered by project-LICHEN-m5m1.5. ping_l2 trips Zephyr compiler_stack_protect.c:39 in the idle thread with CONFIG_IDLE_STACK_SIZE=2048 on both ARM64 and x86_64 Native64 hosts. Increasing the test idle stack did not fix it. Logs also show two lichen_l2 RX authentication failures (-200) immediately before the canary fatal. Instrument the canary/write path and determine whether malformed/auth-failed RX handling corrupts memory.","notes":"ARM64 and x86_64 Native64 both fail at WEST_TOPDIR/zephyr/kernel/compiler_stack_protect.c:39 with Zephyr FATAL ERROR 2 after CONFIG_IDLE_STACK_SIZE=2048; ping_l2 logs two authentication failed (-200) warnings first. Three sizing/reproduction attempts exhausted; next step is watchpoint/canary instrumentation.","title":"Diagnose ping_l2 stack corruption"}

new_value: Fixed via 5ix1.4.2: removed large found_ipv6 buffer from peer_try_all_pubkeys, re-run winner lichen_link_rx after constant-time scan. Eliminates RX thread stack pressure corrupting idle canary. Auth -200 paths reduced locals. EC2 twister native/64 + qemu + Renode pass with clean canary and independent oracles. ping_l2 now passes stack protection. 3 review passes clean. Closes with all 5ix1.4.x coordinated.
